title: gladiolus hollandii
intro: Gladiolus hollandii, also known as the Dutch or common gladiolus, is a perennial flowering plant species that belongs to the iris family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus hollandii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus hollandii can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
